name: FastAPI Development
description: Building high-performance REST APIs with FastAPI
best_practices: Use Pydantic v2 models for request/response validation
Implement dependency injection for shared logic
Use async endpoints for I/O-bound operations
coding_standards: Route handlers in separate router files
Use dependency injection for DB sessions
common_patterns: Service layer between routes and DB
anti_patterns: Mixing business logic in route handlers
Synchronous heavy operations in async endpoints
system_context: You are a FastAPI expert. Build production-ready APIs.
validation_rules: Check all endpoints return proper status codes
